---
title: "Compare model performance"
author: "Puck Quarles van Ufford"
date: today
format: html
---

# Set up

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| message: false
#| echo: true

library("tidyverse")
```

# Load results

```{r}
#| label: load_results
#| message: false
#| echo: true

results_cox <- read_tsv("../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv", 
                        col_names = c("model", "features", "outcome",
                                      "mean_c_index", "sd_c_index",
                                      "lower_95", "upper_95",
                                      "method"))

results_stepwise_cox_100 <- read_tsv("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_100_max.tsv",
                                     col_names = c("model", "features", "outcome",
                                                   "mean_c_index", "sd_c_index",
                                                   "lower_95", "upper_95",
                                                   "n_features"))

results_stepwise_cox_50 <- read_tsv("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_50_max.tsv",
                                    col_names = c("model", "features", "outcome",
                                                  "mean_c_index", "sd_c_index",
                                                  "lower_95", "upper_95",
                                                  "n_features"))

results_stepwise_cox_25 <- read_tsv("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_25_max.tsv",
                                    col_names = c("model", "features", "outcome",
                                                  "mean_c_index", "sd_c_index",
                                                  "lower_95", "upper_95",
                                                  "n_features"))

results_rsf <- read_tsv("../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv", 
                        col_names = c("model", "features", "outcome",
                                      "mean_c_index", "sd_c_index", 
                                      "lower_95", "upper_95", 
                                      "split_rule"))
```

Combine Cox results.

```{r}
#| label: combine_cox_results
#| message: false
#| echo: true

results_all_cox <- results_stepwise_cox_100 |> 
  mutate(method = "forward-stepwise") |> 
  bind_rows(results_cox)
```

# Summarize results

Compare C-indeces across different Cox models.

```{r}
#| label: cox_c_indeces
#| message: false
#| echo: true

results_all_cox |> 
  mutate(outcome = factor(outcome, 
                          levels = c("OS", 
                                     "DFS"))) |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = features,
                       y = mean_c_index,
                       color = method)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                    ymax = upper_95),
                width = 0.2,
                alpha = 0.5,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Types of features included",
       y = "C-index (95% CI)",
       title = "Concordance of Cox models",
       color = "Feature selection method") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) + 
  ylim(0.3, 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, 
             nrow = 2)
  
ggsave("../results/08_C_indeces_cox.png",
       width = 6.5,
       height = 8,
       units = "in")
```

Compare C-indeces across different RSF models.

```{r}
#| label: rsf_c_indeces
#| message: false
#| echo: true

results_rsf |> 
  mutate(outcome = factor(outcome, 
                          levels = c("OS", 
                                     "DFS")),
         split_rule = factor(split_rule, 
                             levels = c("logrank", 
                                        "logrankscore", 
                                        "bs.gradient"))) |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = features,
                       y = mean_c_index,
                       color = split_rule)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                    ymax = upper_95),
                width = 0.2,
                alpha = 0.5,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Types of features included",
       y = "C-index (95% CI)",
       title = "Concordance of RSF models",
       color = "Tree splitting rule") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  ylim(0.3, 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, 
             nrow = 2)
  
ggsave("../results/08_C_indeces_rsf.png",
       width = 6.5,
       height = 8,
       units = "in")
```

# Compare forward Cox 

```{r}
#| label: compare_forward_cox_max_iterations
#| message: false
#| echo: true

results_stepwise_cox_compared <- results_stepwise_cox_50 |> 
  mutate(max_iterations = "50") 

results_stepwise_cox_compared <- results_stepwise_cox_25 |> 
  mutate(max_iterations = "25") |> 
  bind_rows(results_stepwise_cox_compared)

results_stepwise_cox_compared <- results_stepwise_cox_100 |> 
  mutate(max_iterations = "100") |> 
  bind_rows(results_stepwise_cox_compared)

results_stepwise_cox_compared |> 
  mutate(outcome = factor(outcome, 
                          levels = c("OS", 
                                     "DFS")),
         max_iterations = factor(max_iterations, 
                                 levels = c("25", 
                                            "50",
                                            "100"))) |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = features,
                       y = mean_c_index,
                       color = max_iterations)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                    ymax = upper_95),
                width = 0.2,
                alpha = 0.5,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Types of features included",
       y = "C-index (95% CI)",
       title = "Comparing concordance of forward stepwise Cox models",
       color = "Maximum number of iterations") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, 
             ncol = 2)

ggsave("../results/08_cox_model_iterations.png")
```

# Compare all models

Only using the logrank splitting rule for RSF, since it is the default and there is no significant difference between the models

```{r}
#| label: compare_all_methods
#| message: false
#| echo: true

all_models <- results_rsf |> 
  filter(split_rule == "logrank") |> 
  mutate(label = "RSF")

all_models <- results_all_cox |> 
  mutate(label = case_when(method == "classic" ~ "Classic Cox",
                           method == "lasso" ~ "Lasso-regularized Cox",
                           method == "elastic-net" ~ "Elastic-net-regularized Cox",
                           method == "prevalence_filter" ~ "Classic Cox on prevalence-filtered features",
                           method == "forward-stepwise" ~ "Forward stepwise Cox")) |> 
  bind_rows(all_models)

all_models |> 
  mutate(outcome = factor(outcome, 
                          levels = c("OS", 
                                     "DFS"))) |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = features,
                       y = mean_c_index,
                       color = label)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                    ymax = upper_95),
                width = 0.2,
                alpha = 0.5,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Types of features included",
       y = "C-index (95% CI)",
       title = "Comparing C-index across models",
       color = "Model") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")  +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 6)) +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, 
             nrow = 2)

ggsave("../results/08_C_indeces.png")
```
